name: Tramazoline
description: Tramazoline is under investigation in clinical trial NCT01601509 (Nasal Tramazoline and Dexamethazone in Obstructive Sleep Apnea (OSA) Patients Tramazoline and).

interactions.name: Iobenguane
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Iobenguane can be decreased when used in combination with Tramazoline.

interactions.name: Linezolid
interactions.description: Linezolid may increase the hypertensive activities of Tramazoline.

interactions.name: Atomoxetine
interactions.description: Atomoxetine may increase the hypertensive activities of Tramazoline.

interactions.name: Tedizolid Phosphate
interactions.description: Tedizolid Phosphate may increase the hypertensive activities of Tramazoline.

interactions.name: Phenylpropanolamine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Phenylpropanolamine is combined with Tramazoline.
